description:
Investigation ticket. Run the codegen pipeline twice:
  (a) Old path: ir_inline runs, reducer runs without Inlined producer.
  (b) New path: reducer runs with Inlined producer, ir_inline disabled.

For each fixture, diff the surviving IR. Document:
  - Where new path differs from old path.
  - For each difference, is it correct? (runtime parity, golden
    matches, spec set equivalence)

If new path is provably equivalent or strictly better: proceed to E.3.
If gaps: E.1 needs more work before E.3 can land.

## Acceptance

- A doc artifact in docs/walkthroughs/inline-handoff-audit.md
  enumerating per-fixture before/after.
- Decision: proceed (link to E.3) or iterate on E.1.

## Removes

Nothing — investigation only.

comments.text: Closed alongside .11. Audit was predicated on .11 landing.

title: fz-CO.E.2 — Audit: reducer's Inlined matches ir_inline's inlinings
